meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't monetize skills (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't monetize skills. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for Monetization
content.seo_description: Learn to monetize your skills with this advanced Antigravity project template. A step-by-step checklist for students using Claude Code to build SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: Monetization fails when your code remains a 'tutorial project.' To bridge the gap, you must transition from script-kiddie to product architect. Use the Antigravity project template to enforce production-grade modularity, then leverage Claude Code to accelerate feature shipping, ensuring your portfolio demonstrates real-world scalability, reliability, and immediate commercial utility.
content.intro:
The graveyard of developer careers is paved with 'To-Do list' apps and unpolished clones. You’ve spent months mastering syntax, yet your bank account remains stagnant because you are building features, not solutions. The market doesn't pay for code; it pays for the removal of friction. 

It is time to pivot. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you move beyond the sandbox and into the architecture of high-scale SaaS. This checklist is your blueprint for transforming abstract technical proficiency into a concrete, monetizable asset that signals seniority to employers and clients alike.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize a production-ready structure that separates business logic from API interfaces. We define the core domain models first to ensure data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project structure for a SaaS application using the Antigravity template, ensuring distinct separation between domain models, service layer, and API endpoints.

steps.title: Domain Logic Injection
steps.description: Define the specific problem your app solves. We focus on the 'value prop' logic that makes your tool worth paying for.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core business logic for [SaaS_Niche] within the service layer, incorporating input validation and error handling as per Antigravity standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Implement domain service for user authentication and data processing'

steps.title: API Contract Enforcement
steps.description: Ensure your endpoints are bulletproof. We use type-safe definitions to prevent common runtime failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the service layer. Ensure all responses follow the standard Antigravity JSON envelope format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Generate OpenAPI specs and controllers for the core service'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Automate the path to production. A project isn't monetizable if it lives only on your local machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline for the Antigravity project that includes automated testing and staging deployment triggers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Setup GitHub Actions workflow for building and deploying the app'

steps.title: Monetization Integration
steps.description: Hook into a payment provider. This turns your project from code into a revenue-generating asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe billing webhooks into the Antigravity event-bus to manage subscription states for user accounts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Add Stripe integration for subscription management and webhooks'

pro_tips: Never hardcode environment variables; use the Antigravity .env.vault system for secure, multi-environment secret management.
Optimize for 'Time-to-Value' by implementing a functional MVP in under 48 hours; feature creep is the enemy of monetization.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain consistent naming conventions across the entire codebase, reducing cognitive load.
Always include a 'health check' endpoint; professional SaaS apps are monitored, not just written.
Document your architectural decisions in a /docs/adr folder; this is what separates a student project from a senior-level codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin a 7-day 'User Feedback Loop.' Reach out to 10 potential users in your niche, offer the tool for free in exchange for a video testimonial, and iterate based on their specific pain points.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a builder with a deployable product. Stop worrying about 'getting ready' and start shipping value that people are willing to pay for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
